name: Transcend Credit Solutions
description_short: Transcend Credit Solutions is a Houston-based credit repair company offering dispute services and credit counseling to help consumers improve their credit profiles.
description_long: Transcend Credit Solutions operates as a credit and debt service provider based in Houston, Texas, serving consumers seeking to repair and improve their credit standings. The company is listed under financial consulting and credit & debt service categories, positioning itself within the credit repair industry. With a local presence at 1334 Brittmoore Road in Houston, the company provides accessible services to the greater Houston metropolitan area and beyond through their toll-free phone line. The business maintains an active listing on Yahoo Local, indicating established local market presence. Transcend Credit Solutions focuses on credit repair and debt services, addressing the common consumer need to dispute inaccurate items on credit reports and improve credit scores. Their service model appears centered on helping clients navigate credit reporting challenges and develop strategies for credit improvement. The company's categorization under "fix-my-credit" reflects their primary business function of disputing errors and negative items on credit reports. Limited detailed information is available from the provided web listing, which is typical for local business directory entries. The company operates with a straightforward approach, offering phone-based access to their services through a dedicated toll-free number. Their Houston location serves as a base for operations, though the extent of geographic service area cannot be definitively determined from available data. Consumer consideration should account for the limited transparency in available online materials regarding specific service details, pricing structures, and company credentials.
pros: Toll-free phone access (877-522-9111) for convenient consultation
Established Houston location with physical address for local clients
Listed under both credit repair and financial consulting categories, suggesting dual expertise
Active business listing on Yahoo Local with verification options
Accessible to consumers across geographic regions via toll-free number
Specializes in credit and debt services, indicating focused expertise
cons: Limited online transparency — minimal service details, pricing, or company background available
No verifiable credentials, certifications, or regulatory information visible on local listing
No independent reviews, testimonials, or ratings displayed on the local business listing
Insufficient information to assess company reputation or client satisfaction
No dedicated company website linked; only third-party directory listing visible
best_for: Houston-area residents seeking local credit repair services with phone consultation
Consumers with credit report errors needing dispute and correction assistance
Individuals combining credit repair with debt service management needs
diagnosis: Transcend Credit Solutions is positioned for Houston-area consumers seeking credit repair and dispute services through a local provider. The primary caveat is the scarcity of verifiable information about credentials, pricing, methodologies, and client outcomes — consumers should independently verify the company's legitimacy, licensing status, and regulatory compliance before engaging services.
